# From Scratch Document Component Inventory

Scope: all files under `/from_scratch` and subfolders (including generated inventory/index documents).
Method: Markdown headings and list items, plus structured keys for JSON/YAML documents.

## File: `CORE_IDENTITY_AND_VALUE_PROPOSITION.md`
- **Location:** `from_scratch/CORE_IDENTITY_AND_VALUE_PROPOSITION.md`
- **Components identified:** 5

- **C0001** `Core Identity And Value Proposition` (source line: 1)
  - *(No explicit sub-components detected.)*
- **C0002** `Product identity` (source line: 6)
  - *(No explicit sub-components detected.)*
- **C0003** `Primary value propositions` (source line: 9)
  - **C0003.S0001** `List item: **Deterministic governance:** owner console controls moderation, keys, and lifecycle transitions.` (source line: 10)
  - **C0003.S0002** `List item: **Safe delegation:** strict subset/depth/expiry rules prevent privilege escalation.` (source line: 11)
  - **C0003.S0003** `List item: **Operational confidence:** measurable SLOs, release gates, and abuse-case verification.` (source line: 12)
  - **C0003.S0004** `List item: **Contract stability:** OpenAPI/envelope standards reduce client drift and integration risk.` (source line: 13)
- **C0004** `Intended user/actor model` (source line: 15)
  - **C0004.S0005** `List item: Owners: governance administrators.` (source line: 16)
  - **C0004.S0006** `List item: Keys (primary/secondary/use): delegated execution actors.` (source line: 17)
  - **C0004.S0007** `List item: Keychains: aggregation principals for controlled group authority.` (source line: 18)
- **C0005** `Product promises encoded as engineering constraints` (source line: 20)
  - **C0005.S0008** `List item: Never execute out-of-envelope authorization.` (source line: 21)
  - **C0005.S0009** `List item: Never ship unverifiable contract changes.` (source line: 22)
  - **C0005.S0010** `List item: Never hide failing-path context (request_id + stable error codes).` (source line: 23)

  - **C0015.S5303** `List item: **C0003** `Primary value propositions` (source line: 9)` (source line: 14)
  - **C0015.S5304** `List item: **C0003.S0001** `List item: **Deterministic governance:** owner console controls moderation, keys, and lifecycle transitions.` (source line: 10)` (source line: 15)
  - **C0015.S5305** `List item: **C0003.S0002** `List item: **Safe delegation:** strict subset/depth/expiry rules prevent privilege escalation.` (source line: 11)` (source line: 16)
  - **C0015.S5306** `List item: **C0003.S0003** `List item: **Operational confidence:** measurable SLOs, release gates, and abuse-case verification.` (source line: 12)` (source line: 17)
  - **C0015.S5307** `List item: **C0003.S0004** `List item: **Contract stability:** OpenAPI/envelope standards reduce client drift and integration risk.` (source line: 13)` (source line: 18)
  - **C0015.S5308** `List item: **C0004** `Intended user/actor model` (source line: 15)` (source line: 19)
  - **C0015.S5309** `List item: **C0004.S0005** `List item: Owners: governance administrators.` (source line: 16)` (source line: 20)
  - **C0015.S5310** `List item: **C0004.S0006** `List item: Keys (primary/secondary/use): delegated execution actors.` (source line: 17)` (source line: 21)
  - **C0015.S5311** `List item: **C0004.S0007** `List item: Keychains: aggregation principals for controlled group authority.` (source line: 18)` (source line: 22)
  - **C0015.S5312** `List item: **C0005** `Product promises encoded as engineering constraints` (source line: 20)` (source line: 23)
  - **C0015.S5313** `List item: **C0005.S0008** `List item: Never execute out-of-envelope authorization.` (source line: 21)` (source line: 24)
  - **C0015.S5314** `List item: **C0005.S0009** `List item: Never ship unverifiable contract changes.` (source line: 22)` (source line: 25)
  - **C0015.S5315** `List item: **C0005.S0010** `List item: Never hide failing-path context (request_id + stable error codes).` (source line: 23)` (source line: 26)

  - **C0036.S7056** `List item: **C0173.S1027** `List item: Child envelope must be a strict subset of parent permissions/scope.` (source line: 32)` (source line: 1880)

  - **C0036.S7061** `List item: **C0174.S1031** `List item: Keychains are key principals with `key_class=keychain` and credential material equivalent to other key principals.` (source line: 38)` (source line: 1885)
  - **C0036.S7062** `List item: **C0174.S1032** `List item: Keychain members may include only `primary_author`, `secondary_author`, and `use` keys.` (source line: 39)` (source line: 1886)
  - **C0036.S7063** `List item: **C0174.S1033** `List item: Keychain-in-keychain membership is forbidden.` (source line: 40)` (source line: 1887)
  - **C0036.S7064** `List item: **C0174.S1034** `List item: Max keychain membership size is `50`.` (source line: 41)` (source line: 1888)
  - **C0036.S7065** `List item: **C0174.S1035** `List item: Effective permissions are computed as set-union across active members, then constrained by explicit keychain policy envelope.` (source line: 42)` (source line: 1889)
  - **C0036.S7066** `List item: **C0174.S1036** `List item: Scope merge is union for positive scope tokens; restrictive dimensions use intersection where policy families define restrictive semantics.` (source line: 43)` (source line: 1890)
  - **C0036.S7067** `List item: **C0174.S1037** `List item: Any revoked/suspended/cancelled member contributes no effective permissions/scope.` (source line: 44)` (source line: 1891)
  - **C0036.S7068** `List item: **C0174.S1038** `List item: Keychain actions must record both keychain actor and resolved source-key lineage references.` (source line: 45)` (source line: 1892)

- **C0178** `Principals` (source line: 11)
  - **C0178.S8832** `List item: **Owner principal:** governance and console authority.` (source line: 12)
  - **C0178.S8833** `List item: **Key principal:** gateway content authority.` (source line: 13)
- **C0179** `Key classes` (source line: 15)
  - **C0179.S8834** `List item: `primary_author`` (source line: 16)
  - **C0179.S8835** `List item: `secondary_author`` (source line: 17)
  - **C0179.S8836** `List item: `use`` (source line: 18)
  - **C0179.S8837** `List item: `keychain` (v1 production-active)` (source line: 19)
- **C0180** `Permission model (v1 allow-list)` (source line: 21)
  - **C0180.S8838** `List item: `posts:read`` (source line: 23)
  - **C0180.S8839** `List item: `posts:create`` (source line: 24)
  - **C0180.S8840** `List item: `posts:edit`` (source line: 25)
  - **C0180.S8841** `List item: `comments:create`` (source line: 26)
  - **C0180.S8842** `List item: `keys:issue`` (source line: 27)
  - **C0180.S8843** `List item: `keys:revoke`` (source line: 28)
  - **C0180.S8844** `List item: `keychains:manage`` (source line: 29)
- **C0181** `Delegation invariants` (source line: 31)
  - **C0181.S8845** `List item: Child envelope must be a strict subset of parent permissions/scope.` (source line: 32)
  - **C0181.S8846** `List item: Delegation max depth is `3`.` (source line: 33)
  - **C0181.S8847** `List item: Delegated credentials must carry explicit expiry.` (source line: 34)
  - **C0181.S8848** `List item: Delegation lineage must be preserved for token claim checks.` (source line: 35)
- **C0182** `Keychain invariants (v1 production)` (source line: 37)
  - **C0182.S8849** `List item: Keychains are key principals with `key_class=keychain` and credential material equivalent to other key principals.` (source line: 38)
  - **C0182.S8850** `List item: Keychain members may include only `primary_author`, `secondary_author`, and `use` keys.` (source line: 39)
  - **C0182.S8851** `List item: Keychain-in-keychain membership is forbidden.` (source line: 40)
  - **C0182.S8852** `List item: Max keychain membership size is `50`.` (source line: 41)
  - **C0182.S8853** `List item: Effective permissions are computed as set-union across active members, then constrained by explicit keychain policy envelope.` (source line: 42)
  - **C0182.S8854** `List item: Scope merge is union for positive scope tokens; restrictive dimensions use intersection where policy families define restrictive semantics.` (source line: 43)
  - **C0182.S8855** `List item: Any revoked/suspended/cancelled member contributes no effective permissions/scope.` (source line: 44)
  - **C0182.S8856** `List item: Keychain actions must record both keychain actor and resolved source-key lineage references.` (source line: 45)
- **C0183** `Surface enforcement model` (source line: 47)
  - **C0183.S8857** `List item: **Console (`/console/api/*`)**: owner JWT (`typ=owner`, console audience).` (source line: 48)
  - **C0183.S8858** `List item: **Gateway (`/api/*`)**: key JWT (`typ=key`, gateway audience) + device guard where required.` (source line: 49)
  - **C0183.S8859** `List item: **Keychain management routes** are console-governed and require owner JWT plus `keychains:manage` policy authorization.` (source line: 50)
- **C0184** `Lifecycle authority` (source line: 52)
  - **C0184.S8860** `List item: Owners can issue/revoke/suspend/cancel keys under governance policy.` (source line: 53)
  - **C0184.S8861** `List item: Key principals may mint descendants only within delegated envelope bounds.` (source line: 54)
  - **C0184.S8862** `List item: Keychain creation and membership mutation are owner-governed operations in v1.` (source line: 55)
  - **C0184.S8863** `List item: Revocation may be local or cascading according to lineage policy.` (source line: 56)
- **C0185** `Related SSOT docs` (source line: 58)
  - **C0185.S8523** `List item: `SECURITY_CONTROLS_SPEC.md`` (source line: 59)

- **C0270** `Strategy` (source line: 11)
  - **C0270.S9213** `List item: Migrations are forward-only and versioned with monotonically increasing identifiers.` (source line: 12)
  - **C0270.S9214** `List item: Production paths run migrations without demo seed data.` (source line: 13)
  - **C0270.S9215** `List item: Non-production paths may run minimal deterministic seed fixtures for smoke and QA.` (source line: 14)
  - **C0270.S9216** `List item: Migration execution must be idempotent at the version ledger level.` (source line: 15)
- **C0271** `Required migration artifacts` (source line: 17)
  - **C0271.S9217** `List item: Schema migration scripts for all table contracts in `DATA_MODEL_SPEC.md`.` (source line: 18)

- **C0272** `Required seed artifacts` (source line: 22)
  - **C0272.S9220** `List item: `owner_seed` (non-production only): one owner account fixture.` (source line: 23)
  - **C0272.S9221** `List item: `auth_seed` (non-production only): one keychain and one member key fixture.` (source line: 24)
  - **C0272.S9222** `List item: `content_seed` (optional): minimal post/comment fixtures for contract smoke.` (source line: 25)
- **C0273** `Safety rules` (source line: 27)
  - **C0273.S9223** `List item: Seed execution is forbidden by default in `prod`.` (source line: 28)
  - **C0273.S9224** `List item: Seed artifacts must never include plaintext secrets committed to VCS.` (source line: 29)
  - **C0273.S9225** `List item: Migration + seed commands must emit machine-readable pass/fail output.` (source line: 30)
- **C0274** `Command contract` (source line: 32)
  - **C0274.S9226** `List item: `composer ops:migrate-smoke` validates migration artifact presence and schema baseline.` (source line: 33)
  - **C0274.S9227** `List item: Optional seed smoke command must verify deterministic fixture counts where enabled.` (source line: 34)
- **C0230** `Verification linkage` (source line: 36)

  - **C0230.S9229** `List item: Release proof requirements are defined in `RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md`.` (source line: 38)
  - **C0230.S9230** `List item: Traceability updates for schema behavior changes are required in `TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md`.` (source line: 39)

  - **C0350.S9410** `List item: Keep envelope format stable during migrations unless major version bump.` (source line: 8)
  - **C0350.S9411** `List item: Pair schema changes with reversible migration paths when feasible.` (source line: 9)
- **C0271** `Required migration artifacts` (source line: 11)
  - **C0271.S9412** `List item: Compatibility assessment (breaking/non-breaking).` (source line: 12)
  - **C0271.S9413** `List item: Data migration plan with backfill/rollback strategy.` (source line: 13)
  - **C0271.S9414** `List item: Test coverage for pre/post migration behavior.` (source line: 14)
  - **C0271.S9415** `List item: Operational smoke checks updated for new state assumptions.` (source line: 15)
- **C0351** `Compatibility checklist` (source line: 17)
  - **C0351.S9416** `List item: Route responses unchanged for legacy clients where promised.` (source line: 18)
  - **C0351.S9417** `List item: Auth/token semantics remain valid across transition window.` (source line: 19)
  - **C0351.S9418** `List item: Monitoring detects migration-induced regressions.` (source line: 20)

## File: `CONTRIBUTION_WORKFLOW_SSOT.md`

  - *(No explicit sub-components detected.)*
- **C0360** `Workflow` (source line: 6)
  - **C0360.S9437** `List item: Identify changed capability and enumerate impacted SSOT artifacts (contracts, machine artifacts, data/security, operations, traceability).` (source line: 7)
  - **C0360.S9438** `List item: Update normative docs first (`20_`, `30_`, `40_` families) before implementation PR merge.` (source line: 8)
  - **C0360.S9439** `List item: Update machine artifacts (`openapi`, envelope schemas) in the same PR where interface shape changes.` (source line: 9)
  - **C0360.S9440** `List item: Update tests and verification docs (`VERIFICATION_STRATEGY.md`, acceptance matrix rows, smoke expectations).` (source line: 10)
  - **C0360.S9441** `List item: Update traceability (`TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md`) and impact map.` (source line: 11)
  - **C0360.S9442** `List item: Attach evidence using templates under `evidence/templates/`.` (source line: 12)
  - **C0360.S9443** `List item: Request required owner/co-reviewers per `DOCUMENT_STATUS_AND_OWNERSHIP.md`.` (source line: 13)
- **C0132** `Required PR payload` (source line: 15)
  - **C0132.S9444** `List item: Completed change-impact map.` (source line: 16)
  - **C0132.S9445** `List item: Verification command output (or CI links) for changed behavior.` (source line: 17)
  - **C0132.S9446** `List item: Explicit compatibility classification (breaking/non-breaking).` (source line: 18)
  - **C0132.S9447** `List item: Updated known-gaps entry when unresolved assumptions remain.` (source line: 19)
- **C0361** `Review policy` (source line: 21)
  - **C0361.S9448** `List item: No SSOT PR merges without explicit verification evidence.` (source line: 22)
  - **C0361.S9449** `List item: Breaking changes require architecture + security signoff.` (source line: 23)
  - **C0361.S9450** `List item: Contract changes without machine-artifact synchronization are rejected.` (source line: 24)
  - **C0361.S9451** `List item: Unresolved gaps must be documented in `KNOWN_GAPS_TRACKER.md`.` (source line: 25)
- **C0362** `SLA and escalation` (source line: 27)
  - **C0362.S9452** `List item: Owner review target: within 2 business days.` (source line: 28)
  - **C0362.S9453** `List item: Security-impacting changes: same-day triage by security owner.` (source line: 29)
  - **C0362.S9454** `List item: If reviewer SLA is missed, escalate through engineering manager/program owner.` (source line: 30)
